comments.author: @MichaelTMCHUNG
comments.text: Boring, stating obvious actions and trying to be alarmist without any evidence!

comments.author: @RawLifeDocumentary.EN26
comments.text: The pharmacy culture here is very different. You can ride your motorbike in, describe your symptoms, receive a small bag of various medications, and leave without going to the hospital for an examination.

replies.author: @TravelToFacts
replies.text: Do you know what makes this system the most different?

replies.author: @uncensoredworldtravel
replies.text: Đúng vậy, văn hóa nhà thuốc ở Việt Nam có những điểm rất đặc trưng, đặc biệt là sự tiện lợi trong việc tiếp cận thuốc và dịch vụ y tế ban đầu.
